skillTree.localised_description: "It's a rabbit's foot. A rabbit. No… Oh never mind - it brings me luck. It does! Trust me!"
You'd better kill this one or they'll keep coming back until one of you is dead. Even then, there's no guarantee it'll be over!
A protective bubble of pressurized wind that Selene claims was the only thing that kept her master from getting poked by unwanted visitors in his private chambers.
Selene works her magic until the spectral skin of her spirits goes from soft and flaccid to hard and unyielding, resistant to any unwanted poking.

effects.description:
Barrier Health:  +800 for Syreen and Mourngul units
	(Hero's army)

skillTree.localised_description: By keeping the spirits glistening, Selene makes their spectral forms so slick that enemy blades simply glide past the sweet spot without ever making meaningful contact.

effects.description:
Melee Defense and Speed: +10% for Syreen and Mourngul units
	(Hero's army)

skillTree.localised_description: Selene insists that a proper soaking is the only way to get her boys to stand tall, even if the resulting saltiness leaves the enemy blinded and gasping.

target_if: Hit point replenishment cap not reached

skillTree.localised_description: Selene ensures that even after a messy finish, her spirits always have enough stamina to rise up and go for another round.

ui_effects.localised_text: Chance of unit gaining hit points

effects.description:
Rebirth Passive: for Syreen and Mourngul units
	(Hero's army)

skillTree.localised_description: These spirits might look scary, but they’re actually quite sensitive and tend to pop the moment someone tries to handle them too roughly.

effects.description:
Messy Departure Passive: for Syreen and Mourngul units
	(Hero's army)

skillTree.localised_description: Selene whips the atmosphere into such a frantic, friction-filled frenzy resulting in a white-hot explosion of electrical energy that obliterates her enemies and leaves the crew confused about why she’s apologizing for finishing a little sooner than expected.
Selene spends all day staring at the poles and peaks, claiming that if something stands out in the distance, she’ll be the first one to wrap her hands around it.

effects.description: Lucky: +20% Magic item drop chance from battle

skillTree.localised_description: Selene’s physical form is as unyielding as a rising storm, ensuring she remains standing tall even when the battle gets exceptionally hot and heavy.
Selene is never satisfied with just the surface; she insists on probing deep into the core of every mystery until the answers finally start gushing out.
Selene ensures the Winds glide through her fingers with zero resistance, making every release feel effortless and surprisingly cheap.

effects.description: Winds of Magic cost: -10% for all spells
Winds of Magic cost: -20% for all spells
Winds of Magic cost: -30% for all spells

skillTree.localised_description: Selene builds up a pulsating dome of enchanted water, using the rhythmic pressure to both shield herself and to pump her magic out at a pace that keeps her enemies completely overwhelmed.

effects.description: Winds of Magic cost: -2 for "Urannon's Thunderbolt"
Winds of Magic cost: -2 for "Urannon's Thunderbolt Upgraded"
Miscast base chance: -15% for "Urannon's Thunderbolt Upgraded"

skillTree.localised_description: No matter how far away, none can escape the Kiss of the Deep, nor breathe again with lungs full of seawater.
The tidal currents shall slow the foe's advance.

target_if: Not on or below a platform
Not on or below a platform
Not on or below a platform

effects.description: Winds of Magic cost: -2 for "Tidecall Upgraded"

skillTree.localised_description: Selene coaxes the abyss to release a sudden, high-pressure spray of spirits, claiming they won't satisfied until they’ve finished everyone off.

effects.description: Winds of Magic cost: -2 for "Mistress of the Deeps"

target_if: Not on or below a platform
Not on or below a platform
Not on or below a platform

Winds of Magic cost: -3 for "Biting Wind Upgraded"
Miscast base chance: -15% for "Biting Wind Upgraded"

skillTree.localised_description: Once the mighty Kraken's tentacles take hold, only the toughest can fight their way free.

target_if: Not on or below a platform
Not on or below a platform
Not on or below a platform

Winds of Magic cost: -3 for "Kraken's Pull Upgraded"

Winds of Magic cost: -2 for "Comet of Casandora"
Winds of Magic cost: -4 for "Comet of Casandora Upgraded"
Miscast base chance: -15% for "Comet of Casandora Upgraded"

skillTree.localised_description: By stabbing a staff or some arcane conduit into the ground, an accomplished magic-user can earth or tether the Winds and hopefully reduce a chance of miscasting.
A few magic-users have the ability to store the Winds of Magic for later use, increasing their spellcasting power when it really counts.

effects.description: Winds of Magic power reserve capacity: +5

skillTree.localised_description: Those in the army can find succour or be replenished by the power of this champion.

effects.description: Replenish Troops action: Replenishment rate is increased by an additional 3%
Replenish Troops action: Replenishment rate is increased by an additional 6%
Replenish Troops action: Replenishment rate is increased by an additional 9%

skillTree.localised_description: The sight of this warrior, their stature, import or infamy, can have a calming effect.

effects.description: Spread Control action: Control is modified by an additional 1
Spread Control action: Control is modified by an additional 2
Spread Control action: Control is modified by an additional 3

skillTree.localised_description: Smuggling, racketeering, bootlegging – all in a day’s work for the enterprising pirate!

effects.description: Establish Pirate Cove action: -10% cost to perform
Establish Pirate Cove action: -20% cost to perform
Establish Pirate Cove action: -30% cost to perform

skillTree.localised_description: Such a champion will not bend or break, but slay in their Lord's name.

effects.description: Wound action: Additional 5% chance of wounding target
Wound action: Additional 12% chance of wounding target
Wound action: Additional 21% chance of wounding target

skillTree.localised_description: Lying in wait, experienced and patient, striking when the foe least expects.

effects.description: Assault Units action: Additional 3% casualties inflicted
Assault Units action: Additional 8% casualties inflicted
Assault Units action: Additional 15% casualties inflicted

skillTree.localised_description: An expert in their craft, this Hero knows all the mistakes that can be made and how to best avoid making them.

effects.description: Hero action cost: -10% (excludes Establish Pirate Cove action)
Hero action cost: -20% (excludes Establish Pirate Cove action)
Hero action cost: -40% (excludes Establish Pirate Cove action)

attributes.bullet_text:
Undead units cannot be routed, but take damage when their Leadership is broken.
	
	Undead units also have:
	 Fear and Terror Immunity
	
	Undead units may also have their hit points restored by special characters such as the Vampire Counts Necromancer.
This unit frightens all enemy units, reducing their leadership when nearby. It is also immune to fear. Fear penalties do not stack.
This unit can cause terror, making its melee target rout for a short time. Units that cause terror are immune to terror and fear themselves.
This unit provides a leadership bonus to nearby allies. Units within range of both the Lord's aura and an encouraging unit will receive the larger of the two bonuses.
This unit can hide in forests until enemy units get too close.
Speed and combat penalties caused by terrain are ignored by this unit.

items.colour_text: A necklace of iridescent pearls held together by a brass clasp etched with what Selene claims are ancient Arabyan sigils of fluidity. They continuously generate a suspiciously sticky substance that help to keep Selene in constant tune to the Winds of Magic.

effects.description:
Winds of Magic power reserve: +10 per turn
	(Hero's army)

Winds of Magic power reserve capacity: +20
	(Hero's army)

items.colour_text: A brine‑crusted relic dredged from the depths of the Great Ocean. Selene insists it is the Grand Spire of the legendary sunken city of Al‑Kuhm, a place she claims once stretched its impressive reach toward the heavens before succumbing to a sudden, wet eruption of wild magic. Having claimed the Spire for herself, she now rides its wobbling edifice into battle, promising that this time the Spire won’t be the only thing going down.

target_if: Not on or below a platform

effects.description:
Campaign movement range: -10%
	(enemy armies in local province)
